classification_rationale: The release materially improves validation, structure, and PM-facing terminology but does not change the end-user operating model enough to qualify as a major or minor version.
summary: Release-candidate integration update with PM-facing queue terminology, current-state assessment coverage, and a local validation and test harness.
upgrade_actions: Adopt current-state assessment artifacts and workflows in the reference workspace.
Use follow-up queue as the PM-facing queue term.
Run local validation and pytest before declaring V2 release-candidate ready.
